violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. > Observed employee change tasks without handwash twice. Needed to prompt employee to handwash between tasks.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. > Ice scoop at the bar found with handle in ice. Corrected on site with manager.

Reheating food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not reheated rapidly so all parts reached a temperature of 165F for 15 seconds within one hour. > Potatoes being reheated from previous night were not reheated rapidly within 1 hour of preparation. Found 120F - 128F after being in a 150F Auto-sham for 3 hours.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. > Chicken dumpling made Saturday May 30th was found in walk in cooler not date marked. Corrected on site.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided 0/3, C TOILET FACILITIES 38 Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
